headline: Water Treatment Chemicals Market by Type, Source, End User, And Region - Global Forecast to 2030
summary: The water treatment chemicals market is forecasted to grow from USD 40.2 billion in 2025 to USD 48.0 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 4.5%. The cooling water treatment segment will see substantial growth, driven by heavy industrial demand and environmental regulations. The residential sector will also expand, fueled by urbanization and municipal water needs. Furthermore, the Middle East & Africa will have robust growth due to structural water shortages and investment in water infrastructure. Key in
